The '''Herglic Trade Empire''' was an empire in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] established by the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglics]] of [[Giju/Legends|Giju]] presumably not long after the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] achieved [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|travel]], prior [[27,500 BBY]]. There was some [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeological]] evidence that the Herglic Trade Empire achieved a superior level of technology that was not paralleled during the [[Rebellion era]]. The Trade Empire joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] around [[13,000 BBY]].
